implementability_review.distinct_reason: The discarded dynamic gate blocked risk-increasing seeds when an online condition ledger proxy was negative. This readiness work adds only a default-off denominator marker for ledger_after buckets and does not block, cap, or prioritize any seed.

search_tooling_update.change: The search scorer can now recognize ledger_after marker denominators when future no-order summaries include transition_count_by_status_side_offset_risk_open_deficit_ledger_after.
search_tooling_update.old_pullback_status: Existing no-order pullbacks still fail closed because they lack ledger_after denominators.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_SOURCE_OPPORTUNITY_LEDGER_MARKER_SUMMARY_DEFAULT_OFF_READY
research_ranking.interpretation: This is instrumentation readiness only. It prepares a strict no-order reproduction question for the ledger_after research lead without enabling any rule or using post-action labels as live criteria.

next_executable_action: Run a local status_hygiene packet for late_repair90_ledger_after_marker_no_order_review, or, if continuing local-only, add a ledger marker scorer that fails closed on old pullbacks and recognizes the new summary fields.
